'''radama''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:tabacco|tabacco]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-d-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tabacco|tabacco]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| radama
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:rædæmæth|rædæmæth]] || [[word:rædæmæj|rædæmæj]] || [[word:rædæmæsh|rædæmæsh]] || [[word:rædæmæ|rædæmæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:radadamath|radadamath]] || [[word:radadamaj|radadamaj]] || [[word:radadamash|radadamash]] || [[word:radadama|radadama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:radamath|radamath]] || [[word:radamaj|radamaj]] || [[word:radamash|radamash]] || [[word:radama|radama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:radafmath|radafmath]] || [[word:radafmaj|radafmaj]] || [[word:radafmash|radafmash]] || [[word:radafmaf|radafmaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:radamatha|radamatha]] || [[word:radamaja|radamaja]] || [[word:radamasha|radamasha]] || [[word:radamaka|radamaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:radamath|radamath]] || [[word:radamaj|radamaj]] || [[word:radamash|radamash]] || [[word:radama|radama]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:radamathal|radamathal]] || [[word:radamajal|radamajal]] || [[word:radamashal|radamashal]] || [[word:radamakal|radamakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:radamathatha|radamathatha]] || [[word:radamajaja|radamajaja]] || [[word:radamashasha|radamashasha]] || [[word:radamaka|radamaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:radamathan|radamathan]] || [[word:radamajan|radamajan]] || [[word:radamashan|radamashan]] || [[word:radamakan|radamakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:radamathaoro|radamathaoro]] || [[word:radamajaoro|radamajaoro]] || [[word:radamashaoro|radamashaoro]] || [[word:radamakaoro|radamakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
